arts.ttl: Liam Manning shares 'strange' Josh Campbell-Slowey injury update in Bristol City fitness latest
arts.sum: Liam Manning has confirmed Bristol City prospect Josh Campbell-Slowey will be out for a "little while" ahead of the Reds' clash with Hull City having suffered a "really strange" quad injury. The defender returned to training last week following a calf injury but Chris Hogg confirmed ahead of City's win over Millwall that the Robins were waiting for an update after he was forced out of a session .

arts.ttl: Harry Cornick sheds light on 'dark times' as he sets out Bristol City's Premier League goal
arts.sum: Harry Cornick has admitted there have been "dark times" for him at Bristol City this season after the forward found the net against Millwall in what was only his second Championship appearance of the campaign. "It's been a long process but it's about the team really, it's about getting the three points tonight at a tough place to come to and keep us moving forward hopefully."

arts.ttl: Eliot Matazo injury update emerges as Hull City star goes under the knife
arts.sum: While Liam Millar remained in Hull and Mohamed Belloumi out in Qatar, Matazo will stay in Amsterdam until he's ready to return to England and continue his recovery on these shores, closely monitored by City's medical staff, and supporters by his family as he recovers from the operation. Boss Ruben Selles has confirmed the 23-year-old has gone to a specialist facility in the Netherlands to undergo his operation after getting the green light from his consultant last week, and will recover in Amsterdam.

arts.ttl: Preview: Bristol City vs. Hull City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Bristol City and Hull City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Former Bristol City boss lands new managerial job in Belgium five years after Ashton Gate exit
arts.sum: Former Bristol City head coach Lee Johnson has landed a surprise new managerial role, with the 43-year-old appointed as interim head coach of Belgian club Lommel SK. After just over a year out of management, Johnson is now back in the dugout as the interim head coach of Lommel SK.

arts.ttl: “Everyone is in disarray” – Hull City owner praised for having rivals on strings and destroying the enemy
arts.sum: Hull City owner Acun Ilıcalı has been praised for the work he’s done with Fenerbahçe, and his ‘dismantling’ of rivals Galatasaray. Fanatik provide comments from Samsunspor president Yuksel Yildirim today in which he praises the Hull City owner, who he credits as being the driving force being Fenerbahçe’s current success. Ilıcalı is the current vice-president The post “Everyone is in disarray” – Hull City owner praised for having rivals on strings and destroying the enemy appeared first on Sport Witness.
